params.value: SELECT OwnerId, Owner.Name, Amount, Name, CreatedDate, CloseDate, StageName, AccountId, Account.Name FROM Opportunity WHERE IsClosed = false AND CreatedDate < 2025-12-12T00:00:00Z AND Owner.GTM_Motion_User__c = 'Inside Sales' ORDER BY CreatedDate ASC LIMIT 200

CUSTOM_ACTION.path: query/?q=SELECT OwnerId, Owner.Name, Amount, Name, CreatedDate, CloseDate, StageName, AccountId, Account.Name FROM Opportunity WHERE IsClosed = false AND CreatedDate < 2025-12-12T00:00:00Z AND Owner.GTM_Motion_User__c = 'Inside Sales' ORDER BY CreatedDate ASC LIMIT 200
